value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade the root Oxc tooling packages.

## Packages

- `oxfmt`: 0.53.0 -> 0.55.0
- `oxlint`: 1.68.0 -> 1.70.0

## Affected manifest

- `package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports newer Oxc formatter and linter releases. Upgrade them together and check whether new lint rules or formatting output affect the repo.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm lint`.
- Run `pnpm format:check`.
- Run `pnpm check`.
- If formatting changes are required, keep them in the same PR as the tooling bump.

frontmatter.title: Upgrade Oxc formatter and linter tooling

value.title: Upgrade Oxc formatter and linter tooling
